title: Colored Axolotl Buckets-Classic Bare Bones Addon
description: This texture pack combines the (colored axolotl buckets) and (Bare Bones) textures. This makes the game more detailed. You can see which axolotl is which color
body: My texture pack is an add-on to the popular Bare Bones textures, which makes the game more colorful and fun. With this add-on, you will be able to see the colors of the axolotls in the buckets that you hold in your hand. I created this texture pack, admiring the work of the author of Colored Axolotl Buckets, who did the same thing for the regular textures of Minecraft.
